name: Joey Valence & Brae
description: '''Joey Valence & Brae''' are an American [[hip-hop]] duo from [[State College, Pennsylvania]], consisting of rappers '''Joseph Bertolino''' (Joey Valence) and '''Braedan Lugue''' (Brae). The duo started making music together in 2021 and released a series of singles. Their breakout single, "Punk Tactics" has been certified RIAA Gold. They have since released three studio albums: ''[[Punk Tactics]]'', ''[[No Hands (album)|No Hands]]'', and ''[[Hyperyouth]]''.
